subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine fragrances! When the Most Great Luminary dawned above the horizons of the nations, darkened realities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب من نفحات الله چون نیر اعظم از آفاق امم اشراق فرمود حقائق ظلمانیه
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @light and darkness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @Manifestation of God as sun
